name: Cinnamon Twist Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Start the bread machine and place the dough into the bread pan, leaving the pan in place inside the machine and close the lid.
3. Place the dough onto a floured surface. Dust the top of the dough and your hands with flour.
4. Pat the dough into a 6" x 10" rectangle.
5. Combine 2 teaspoons cinnamon and 1 teaspoon sugar in a small bowl.
6. Spoon the cinnamon-sugar mixture in three long rows down the center of the dough.
7. Roll the dough into a fat cylinder, rolling to the left and then fold it in half, twisting the ends together.
8. Place the rolled dough back into the bread machine with the lid closed.
9. Be sure to keep the machine closed while applying the cinnamon mixture so that any residual heat stays within the machine.
10. Work quickly as the machine continues its cycle, keeping the cinnamon on for optimal flavor.
11. I use powdered buttermilk (3 tbsp) and 6 oz warm water. You may omit the egg and reduce flour to 2 cups with good results. Also, you can replace honey with sugar and reduce the amount of sugar in the dough to 3 tbsp; it will still be sweet enough. Remember, you'll be handling the dough, so don't worry if it's sticky initially; add more flour when rolling out for best texture. Enjoy!
